atoms.semantic_claim: The downstream `reth-network` crate adds a direct workspace dependency on `ritual-metrics` so Ritual-specific network transaction metric/logging hooks can compile and link.

destinations.evidence: The corresponding dependency block in the port crate omits `ritual-metrics`; repo-wide search found no `ritual-metrics` declaration anywhere in the port workspace.

atoms.required_change: Restore or intentionally reject the `ritual-metrics` dependency in `reth-network` together with the downstream network metrics call sites that depend on it.
atoms.notes: This is not covered upstream in the port manifest. Downstream source files under `crates/net/network/src/` reference `ritual_metrics`, but those call sites are also absent in the port, so this manifest atom remains unported rather than being noise.

summary: The downstream `reth-network` manifest adds `ritual-metrics`, and that dependency is absent from the v2.2.0 port workspace.
notes: Single actionable manifest atom: add the missing dependency only if the associated Ritual metrics call sites from the downstream network crate are also intended to be ported.
